Class DomainStore

java.lang.Object
sudokusolver.csp.DomainStore
public class DomainStore extends Object
A class representing the store for variable domains in a Constraint Satisfaction Problem.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    Map<String, Set<Integer>>
    domains
    The map storing the domains for each variable.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    DomainStore()
    Initializes an empty domain store.
    DomainStore(Map<String, Set<Integer>> domains)
    Initializes the domain store with a given map of variable domains.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    addValue(String variable, int value)
    Adds a specific value to the domain of the given variable.
    void
    addVariable(String variable, Set<Integer> domain)
    Adds a new variable with its corresponding domain to the store.
    void
    addVariables(Map<String, Set<Integer>> domains)
    Adds all variables and their corresponding domains from a given map to this store.
    void
    addVariables(DomainStore domainStore)
    Adds all variables and their corresponding domains from another DomainStore to this store.
    boolean
    allAssigned()
    Checks if all variables in the store have been assigned a single value (i.e., their domains are singletons).
    void
    assignValue(String variable, int value)
    Assigns a specific value to the variable by reducing its domain to a singleton set containing only that value.
    boolean
    containsVariable(String variable)
    Checks if the store contains a domain for the specified variable.
    void
    copyDomains()
    Copies the domains of all variables in the store.
    DomainStore
    deepCopy()
    Creates a deep copy of this DomainStore, including independent copies of all variable domains.
    void
    deleteVariable(String variable)
    Deletes a variable and its corresponding domain from the store.
    Map<String,Integer>
    getAssignment()
    Returns a map representing the current assignment of values to variables.
    Set<Integer>
    getDomain(String variable)
    Returns the domain for the specified variable.
    Set<String>
    getVariables()
    Returns the set of variables stored in this DomainStore.
    boolean
    removeValue(String variable, int value)
    Removes a specific value from the domain of the given variable.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Field Details

    • domains

      public Map<String, Set<Integer>> domains
      The map storing the domains for each variable.

  • Constructor Details

    • DomainStore

      public DomainStore()
      Initializes an empty domain store.

    • DomainStore

      public DomainStore(Map<String, Set<Integer>> domains)
      Initializes the domain store with a given map of variable domains.

      Note on Mutability: The provided map is directly assigned to the internal state of this DomainStore without copying.

      Parameters:
      domains -

  • Method Details

    • getDomain

      public Set<Integer> getDomain(String variable)
      Returns the domain for the specified variable.
      Parameters:
      variable - the variable for which to retrieve the domain
      Returns:
      the set of possible values for the variable

    • removeValue

      public boolean removeValue(String variable, int value)
      Removes a specific value from the domain of the given variable.
      Parameters:
      variable - the variable whose domain is to be modified
      value - the value to be removed from the variable's domain
      Returns:
      true if the value was successfully removed, false if the value was not present

    • addValue

      public boolean addValue(String variable, int value)
      Adds a specific value to the domain of the given variable.
      Parameters:
      variable - the variable whose domain is to be modified
      value - the value to be added to the variable's domain
      Returns:
      true if the value was added, false if the value was already present

    • assignValue

      public void assignValue(String variable, int value)
      Assigns a specific value to the variable by reducing its domain to a singleton set containing only that value.
      Parameters:
      variable - the variable to be assigned
      value - the value to assign to the variable

    • getVariables

      public Set<String> getVariables()
      Returns the set of variables stored in this DomainStore.
      Returns:
      the set of variable names for which domains are stored

    • addVariable

      public void addVariable(String variable, Set<Integer> domain)
      Adds a new variable with its corresponding domain to the store. If the variable already exists, its domain will be overwritten.
      Parameters:
      variable - the name of the variable to add
      domain - the set of possible values for the variable

      Note on Mutability: The provided domain set is directly assigned to the internal state of this DomainStore without copying.

    • addVariables

      public void addVariables(DomainStore domainStore)
      Adds all variables and their corresponding domains from another DomainStore to this store. If a variable already exists, its domain will be overwritten.
      Parameters:
      domainStore - the DomainStore from which to copy variables and domains

    • addVariables

      public void addVariables(Map<String, Set<Integer>> domains)
      Adds all variables and their corresponding domains from a given map to this store. If a variable already exists, its domain will be overwritten.
      Parameters:
      domains - the map of variable names to their corresponding domains to be added

    • deleteVariable

      public void deleteVariable(String variable)
      Deletes a variable and its corresponding domain from the store.
      Parameters:
      variable - the name of the variable to delete

    • containsVariable

      public boolean containsVariable(String variable)
      Checks if the store contains a domain for the specified variable.
      Parameters:
      variable - the name of the variable to check for existence in the store
      Returns:
      true if the store contains a domain for the variable, false otherwise

    • allAssigned

      public boolean allAssigned()
      Checks if all variables in the store have been assigned a single value (i.e., their domains are singletons).
      Returns:
      true if all variables have singleton domains, false otherwise

    • getAssignment

      public Map<String,Integer> getAssignment()
      Returns a map representing the current assignment of values to variables.
      Returns:
      a map from variable names to their assigned values, or null if any variable has multiple possible values

    • copyDomains

      public void copyDomains()
      Copies the domains of all variables in the store.

      Note on Mutability: This method creates a new map and new sets for each variable's domain, ensuring that the copied domains are independent of the original ones and each other.

    • deepCopy

      public DomainStore deepCopy()
      Creates a deep copy of this DomainStore, including independent copies of all variable domains.
      Returns:
      a new DomainStore instance with copied domains
